items.title: Guest Trust Clarity discovery
items.name: Guest Trust Clarity discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether clearer price, policy, and listing-trust presentation improves booking conversion without increasing support burden.
items.opportunity: Clarify how much decision drop-off is caused by price ambiguity and listing-trust uncertainty versus supply relevance alone.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve guest booking confidence by clarifying total price, listing trust, host reputation, and cancellation explanation.

riskFocus.question: Will guests book more often if price and cancellation terms are clearer earlier?
riskFocus.hypothesis: High-intent guests abandon less when total price and cancellation consequences are legible before checkout.

plannedActivities: Compare abandonment across fee-heavy and fee-light listings.
Test revised listing and checkout trust treatments.
Review support contacts linked to pricing and cancellation confusion.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to standardize guest price and policy explanation patterns across all focus markets in Q2.

items.title: New Host Fast Activation discovery
items.name: New Host Fast Activation discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing which setup steps and missing defaults most delay time to first booking for new hosts.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether friction sits more in activation complexity, listing content quality, or launch pricing uncertainty.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to reduce host setup friction with simpler authoring, more useful defaults, and better first-booking pricing guidance.

riskFocus.question: Which activation changes materially improve time to first booking?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Fewer required setup decisions plus better pricing defaults improve launch quality enough to reduce first-booking time.

plannedActivities: Compare first-booking outcomes across launch-pricing cohorts.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which activation steps can be deferred without harming listing quality or compliance.

items.title: Operator Control and Recovery discovery
items.name: Operator Control and Recovery discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing where professional hosts lose time across delegated permissions, turnover workflows, and support-case handoffs.
items.opportunity: Clarify which portfolio workflows most constrain operator scale and retention.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to give professional operators stronger delegated control, better portfolio issue visibility, and faster resolution workflows.

riskFocus.question: Can operators understand and trust delegated permission boundaries?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Operators act faster and with fewer errors when permissions are explicit and auditable at listing level.

plannedActivities: Map end-to-end portfolio issue resolution flows.
Prototype clearer permission and case-status views.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which operator controls should be treated as first-class portfolio workflows this quarter.
